jobs.title: Find a Job
jobs.description: Check the details in easy language and choose the job that suits you.

warning.title: Watch your weekly hours
warning.desc: Students and family stay visa holders are limited to 28 hours per week. This includes all jobs combined.

messages.apply_success: Application sent! Wait for the employer's response.

earnings.title: My Page
earnings.description: View your ratings, earnings, and submitted data.
earnings.total_note: Reflected from employer-submitted documents and work conditions

no_edit.title: You cannot edit this
no_edit.desc: Wages are reflected from Form 3 and the work conditions (hourly wage and weekly hours) submitted by the employer.

empty.title: No earnings recorded
empty.desc: When the employer submits documents, your earnings will appear here automatically.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: View documents submitted to Hello Work.

auto.title: Documents are created automatically
auto.desc: You only need to confirm your residence card details. The employer and app handle the complex procedures.

empty.title: No documents yet
empty.desc: When the employer submits documents about you, they will appear here.

consult.title: Support
consult.description: Check your concerns in easy language.

free.title: Consultation and learning are free
free.desc: Part of the shop's fee supports workers' life consultations and Japanese learning.

ai.title: Ask AI
ai.desc: Available 24 hours in easy language in production.

human.title: Talk to a person
human.desc: Booking with an expert and interpreter support is planned.

topics: Residence card, renewal, work hour limits
Illness, injury, how to find a hospital

rate.title: Rate
rate.description: Rate the employer from 1 to 5 stars. This builds mutual trust.

comment.label: Comment (optional)
comment.placeholder: e.g. they explained things carefully, would work there again
